title: 3 SUMMITS WITH KIM JONG UN — NORTH KOREA'S STOCKPILE GREW
title_alt: SINGAPORE. HANOI. DMZ. MORE WEAPONS THAN BEFORE.
"WE FELL IN LOVE" — AND NORTH KOREA GOT MORE NUKES
BROKEN: Solve the Nuclear Threat | SEALED
description:
Three summits with Kim Jong Un — Singapore (Jun 12, 2018), Hanoi (Feb 27, 2019), DMZ handshake (Jun 30, 2019). Then the famous line: "we fell in love."

CSIS Beyond Parallel and the Federation of American Scientists tracked the North Korean warhead count across the term. It went up, not down. The promise was to solve the nuclear threat. The receipt is a regime that ended the term with more weapons than it started with.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=nk-nukes

#politics #northkorea #trump #shorts #factcheck
